name: 巴洛克轨道耳环｜真实地中海冷启动广告

product.name: The Baroque Orbit - Earrings
geometry_locks: tiny green stones on the hoop front

visual_bible.intent: 让观众相信这是一次真实地中海度假地的珠宝拍摄，而不是影棚合成图。
visual_bible.character_lock: 同一位成年黑发模特，湿润后梳头发，真实皮肤纹理，宽松白色亚麻衬衫。
visual_bible.environment_lock: 海岸石灰岩、橄榄树、暖色自然日照和清晰叶影。
visual_bible.camera_family: 50-85mm natural editorial portrait and macro product photography
visual_bible.light_lock: late-afternoon directional sun from frame left with olive-leaf shadow breakup

frames.edit_use: generate 4s and trim to the strongest 1.0-1.5s opening beat

allocation.secondary: one restrained gaze and earring motion beat
allocation.economized: camera travel, hand action and background activity

frames.camera_contract: Locked 85mm macro portrait framing with no more than a 2 percent push-in; keep the eye, ear and complete earring sharp.
frames.motion_contract: One blink and a tiny gaze shift toward the light; one loose hair strand moves; the earring sways once by inertia and settles; hands remain outside frame.
frames.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧并锁定人物身份、真实肤质、眼睛、耳朵、白色亚麻衣领、耳环和光线。4秒单镜头，保持当前85mm微距人像构图，机位基本锁定，只允许不超过2%的极慢推进。0-1.5秒模特自然眨眼一次，视线轻微转向光线；1.5-3秒一缕发丝受轻风移动，耳环因头部极小位移轻摆一次；3-4秒全部停稳。双手不得进入画面。保持金色圆环、绿色碎石、不规则白色巴洛克珍珠和末端金珠完全不变，不换脸、不磨皮、不新增首饰或道具。环境声只有轻风与很远的海浪，不要音乐。

frames.camera_contract: 85mm macro feel; one controlled push-in of about 5 percent; end on the foreground hoop stones and pearl texture.
frames.motion_contract: Olive leaves and their shadows move gently; the earrings stay resting on the limestone; only physically plausible reflections change.
frames.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧并锁定耳环结构、数量和场景。4秒单镜头，从当前竖屏构图开始，85mm微距感，镜头极慢推进约5%，终点停在前景耳环的绿色碎石与珍珠纹理。橄榄叶受轻风小幅摆动，叶影在石面缓慢移动，珍珠和金属只发生真实高光变化；两只耳环始终贴着石面，不滚动、不漂浮。保持金色圆环、绿色碎石、不规则白色巴洛克珍珠和末端金珠完全不变，不新增物体，不变形。环境声只有轻风和极弱海浪，不要音乐。

allocation.economized: camera travel, hand action and background activity

frames.camera_contract: Locked 50-85mm portrait framing with no more than a 2 percent push-in; keep the visible ear and earring sharp.
frames.motion_contract: One blink, a small breath and a 3-5 degree head turn toward the light; the earring sways once by inertia and settles; hands remain outside frame.
frames.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧并锁定人物身份、真实肤质、发型、白色亚麻衬衫、耳环和石灰岩场景。4秒单镜头，保持当前50-85mm头肩构图，机位基本锁定，只允许不超过2%的缓慢推进。0-1.5秒模特自然眨眼一次并轻吸气；1.5-3秒头部朝光线方向缓慢转动约3-5度；3-4秒停稳，耳环因惯性轻摆一次后静止。始终露出完整耳环，双手不得进入画面。保持金色圆环、绿色碎石、不规则白色巴洛克珍珠和末端金珠完全不变；不改变脸、服装、背景和光向，不新增首饰或道具。环境声只有轻风与远处海浪，不要音乐。

frames.edit_use: generate 4s and trim to a 1.5-2.0s emotional brand ending; add logo and CTA in post only

allocation.primary: model, earring identity and copy-safe composition
allocation.secondary: sea-breeze motion in hair, linen and earring
allocation.economized: camera travel, hand action and scene density

frames.camera_contract: 50-85mm rear three-quarter portrait; one slow pull-back of about 3 percent; preserve the model on the right third and the open sea copy-safe area on the left.
frames.motion_contract: The model breathes and shifts her gaze farther toward the horizon; sea breeze moves loose hair ends and linen; the visible earring sways once and settles; hands remain outside frame.
frames.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧并锁定同一位模特、真实肤质、湿润后梳黑发、白色亚麻衬衫、可见耳环、石灰岩海岸和左侧海天留白。4秒单镜头，保持50-85mm背后三分侧人像构图，镜头从当前画面极慢后撤约3%，模特始终位于右侧三分之一，左侧文案安全区保持干净。0-2秒模特自然呼吸，视线缓慢移向更远的海平线；2-4秒海风带动发尾和亚麻衣领轻微移动，可见耳环轻摆一次后停稳。双手不得进入画面，模特不要转向镜头。保持金色圆环、绿色碎石、不规则白色巴洛克珍珠和末端金珠完全不变，不换脸、不新增首饰、人物或道具。环境声只有轻风与远处海浪，不要音乐。

variant_sets.name: 真实拱廊与庭院 A/B
variant_sets.intent: 用真实人物和连续地中海场景替代悬浮产品或抠图式构图；A 抓停留，B 用场景和人物完成情绪收尾。

frames.camera_contract: 85mm 近景人像，机位锁定，只允许不超过 2% 的极慢推进；耳朵和完整耳环保持清晰。
frames.motion_contract: 0-1 秒自然眨眼一次；1-3 秒视线略微掠向镜头外的光线，发尾被轻风带动；3-4 秒停稳，耳环因极小转头惯性轻摆一次后静止。
frames.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧并锁定同一位模特、真实肤质、湿润后梳黑发、白色亚麻衬衫、耳环、石灰岩拱廊、橄榄叶和海岸自然光。4秒单镜头，保持当前85mm近景人像构图，机位基本锁定，只允许不超过2%的极慢推进。0-1秒模特自然眨眼一次；1-3秒视线轻微掠向画面外的光线，发尾被轻风带动；3-4秒全部停稳，耳环因极小转头惯性轻摆一次后静止。始终保持可见耳朵和完整耳环清晰。保持金色绿色碎石耳扣、一个小金色连接环、一颗不规则白色巴洛克珍珠和珍珠末端金珠完全不变，不换脸、不磨皮、不新增首饰、人物或道具。环境声只有轻风和远处海浪，不要音乐。

frames.camera_contract: 50mm 中景，机位锁定；只允许约 2% 的缓慢后撤，保持人物在右侧三分之一和左侧空白墙面。
frames.motion_contract: 0-2 秒模特向前走一小步后自然回望；2-4 秒橄榄叶影和亚麻衣角受轻风移动，耳环轻摆一次后停稳。
frames.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧并锁定同一位模特、真实肤质、湿润后梳黑发、白色亚麻衬衫、可见耳环、地中海石灰岩庭院、橄榄树和暖色自然光。4秒单镜头，保持当前50mm中景构图，机位基本锁定，只允许约2%的缓慢后撤；模特始终位于右侧三分之一，左上浅色墙面保持干净作为后期文案安全区。0-2秒模特向前走一小步后自然回望；2-4秒橄榄叶影和亚麻衣角被轻风带动，耳环轻摆一次后停稳。保持金色绿色碎石耳扣、一个小金色连接环、一颗不规则白色巴洛克珍珠和珍珠末端金珠完全不变，不换脸、不新增首饰、人物、杯子、桌子、书、花瓶或花卉。环境声只有轻风与远处海浪，不要音乐。

tiktok_distribution.objective: cold-start traffic to the independent product page

edit_timeline.on_screen_copy: See the pair. Link in bio.

caption_variants.text: Not perfectly round. That's the point. Meet The Baroque Orbit: irregular pearl drops, green accents, and a silhouette made to catch the light. Discover the new series through the link in bio.
Would you wear these with sunlit linen or an all-black evening look? The Baroque Orbit pairs irregular pearl drops with green accents. See the pair through the link in bio.
The Baroque Orbit. Irregular pearl drops. Green accents. $44.99 USD. See the exact pair in our new series through the link in bio.

tiktok_distribution.pinned_comment: The exact pair shown is The Baroque Orbit. Open the link in our bio and choose New Series.

music_plan.license_source: TikTok Commercial Music Library only, or an owned original track with documented rights
music_plan.selection_timing: Choose and log the exact track on publishing day because availability varies by region and account.

primary.sound_palette: dry hand percussion, muted bass, airy plucked strings, restrained warm pad, no vocals
primary.reason: Keeps the Mediterranean lifestyle mood while providing clear edit beats and enough forward motion for product discovery.
primary.cml_search_recipe: Select target region and commercial placements; search Fashion or Lifestyle, Electronic, Chill or Dynamic, 0-20 seconds; prefer a track with a soft pickup and clear downbeats near the planned cuts.

ab_variant.sound_palette: tight kick, rim click, muted synth pulse, no vocals
ab_variant.test_purpose: Test a more TikTok-native, click-oriented pace without changing visuals or caption.

brand_variant.sound_palette: soft pulse, airy texture, sparse plucked notes, no vocals
brand_variant.test_purpose: Use for organic brand storytelling, not as the first traffic-focused version.

music_plan.post_audio: Generate every Seedance clip without music. Add one continuous CML track in post; keep sea and wind low underneath and place one restrained jewelry chime at 1.3 seconds.

publishing_test.do_not_change_together: When testing, change music or caption or opening copy, never all three at once.

diagnosis.weak_early_retention: Repair the first 1.3 seconds and opening copy.
diagnosis.strong_watch_weak_click: Strengthen CTA and verify the product-page match.
diagnosis.clicks_weak_landing_views: Check mobile page speed, redirects and landing-page clarity.

publishing_test.paid_follow_up: If organic watch quality is acceptable, use Promote website visits or Ads Manager Landing Page View with the direct product path, TikTok Pixel and the paid UTM query.

accept: product geometry stays stable in every frame
model identity and natural skin remain stable
no new props or generated text
end state is usable for editing
review_gate.repair_rule: Change one variable per retake. Day 1 uses three takes for frames 01-03. Generate frame 04 in Day 2 slot 1, then use the other two expiring daily slots for one-variable repairs or the next product.
review_gate.after_three_failures: Stop rerolling; simplify the motion contract or composite the product layer in post.
